Module.ContentJson: {"Title":"Quiz: Communications","Description":"2 questions","PassScore":50,"Questions":[{"Text":"What is phishing?","Options":["Stealing data using fake messages","A type of antivirus","A Wi‑Fi encryption method"],"CorrectOptionIndex":0},{"Text":"Best action on a suspicious email?","Options":["Open attachments to check","Do not click links; verify sender","Reply with your password"],"CorrectOptionIndex":1}]}

{"Title":"Quiz: Devices","Description":"2 questions","PassScore":50,"Questions":[{"Text":"Why install OS updates?","Options":["To close security vulnerabilities","To increase screen brightness","To speed up charging"],"CorrectOptionIndex":0},{"Text":"Best practice for passwords?","Options":["Same password everywhere","Use a password manager & unique passwords","Password 123456"],"CorrectOptionIndex":1}]}

{"Title":"Quiz: Networks","Description":"2 questions","PassScore":50,"Questions":[{"Text":"Is public Wi‑Fi always safe?","Options":["Yes","No, traffic can be intercepted","Only safe at night"],"CorrectOptionIndex":1},{"Text":"What does a VPN help with?","Options":["Protecting traffic on untrusted networks","Removing viruses","Charging faster"],"CorrectOptionIndex":0}]}
